topIngredients.name: Activated Charcoal
topIngredients.benefit: Draws out impurities and excess sebum from pores

topIngredients.name: Salicylic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Exfoliates inside pores to reduce blackheads

topIngredients.name: Kaolin Clay
topIngredients.benefit: Absorbs excess oil without excessive dryness

verdict: GlamGlow Supermud delivers an instant deep-cleansing experience with a noticeable glow effect. The charcoal-salicylic acid combo is genuinely effective for congested skin, though the formula can be drying for non-oily types.
